title: chrysosplenium axillare
intro: Chrysosplenium axillare, also known as the axillary spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium axillare include reducing pain and swelling, improving immune function, and possessing antioxidant properties. This plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tablets.
